head: 8c77c28 2026-07-10 12:10:07 +0200
branches_note: Default branch is main (origin/HEAD unset; resolved main). origin/dev is 22 commits AHEAD of main (tip 478355f, 2026-07-13) — the ENG-2069 nothing-on-main hazard: night-fix work may live on dev; this audit reflects merged origin/main only. origin/crew/daniel is 0 ahead of main.

E1-S1.note: MultiIssuerVerifier resolves iss->IssuerConfig, verifies per-issuer JWKS + claims fail-closed, projects the canonical Principal and parses cell/cell_epoch (pkg/auth/verifier.go, principal.go, cell_claims.go); covered by verifier_test.go, verifier_crypto_test.go, principal_test.go, cell_claims_test.go.

E1-S2.note: IntrospectionCache with TTL + MaxStaleness hard wall and ErrStaleIntrospection fail-closed past the wall (introspect.go:82); tested in introspect_test.go + verifier_introspection_test.go.

E1-S3.note: Redis-backed DenyStore keyed deny:{tenant}:{jti} with TTL=remaining exp, RevocationHandler over the outbox->Kafka path, whole-tenant fallback for the frozen identity.token.revoked contract; denylist_test.go covers it.

E1-S4.note: RequireFresh path implemented: IntrospectionCache.Fresh (no-cache, no-grace) + MultiIssuerVerifier.VerifyFresh; exercised in introspect_test.go + verifier_introspection_test.go.

E1-S5.note: Deny-by-default RequireScope + EffectiveScope intersection, RouteWorkloadIdentityOnly route class, and Cell.Guard mapping mismatch to 421 (ErrCellMismatch); scope_test.go, workload_test.go, cell_test.go.

evidence: gates via ci.yml TestAuthConformanceV1ToV12 + make authtest-no-skip-gate
E1-S6.note: Shipped conformance suite (authtest.go 22KB + fixtures.go) with TestAuthConformanceV1ToV12 wired as a CI release gate plus a no-skip gate (ci.yml lines 94-97); authtest_gate_test.go.

E1-S7.note: APIKeyCredential.Apply sets Authorization: Bearer and rejects an empty key, but rotation is an explicit TODO (credential.go:18) and there is no rotation logic or test; helper exists, rotation missing.

E2-S1.note: CloudEvents envelope helpers, orvexcell stamp, pinned-schema validation, and fail-closed Consume/CheckCell that drops foreign-cell events (ErrCellMismatch); events_test.go, consumer_kafka_test.go, nodegradation_test.go, schema_gate_test.go.

E2-S2.note: Generated event-type constants (eventtypes_gen.go) + AllEventTypes, gate-tested; but the typed payload structs (thin/rich profiles) are NOT generated (0 payload structs) — only the type-name constants exist.

E2-S3.note: BrokerPublisher produces structured-mode JSON to the per-type cell topic with RequireAll acks (kafka-go built-in retries); but OTel trace propagation is absent — no traceparent/headers injected on the Kafka message.

E3-S1.note: Only the resolve-slug primitive is real (Client.ResolveSlug in doc.go, tested). The chokepoint (GetBlocks/PatchBlocks), ACLEvaluate/ACLNarrow, Export and quota-status primitives are documented as 'not yet built' (doc.go:25) and not implemented.

E3-S2.note: QuotaExceededError is a first-class non-retryable terminal error (Retryable()=false, Unwrap->ErrQuotaExceeded) and ResolveSlug maps a 402 to it; but NO test exercises the 402 path — the type is untested behaviourally.

evidence: pkg/engineclient/doc.go:25 (ACL evaluate/narrow listed as not built)
E3-S3.note: Narrow-never-widen ACL typing is not implemented (ACLEvaluate/ACLNarrow not built), and there is no client-discipline layer — httpx offers only status/decode helpers, no deadline/retry/circuit-breaker apparatus.

E3-S4.note: Only unified Search is real (Client.Search in doc.go, tested). Retrieve, Related, Duplicates and AttachmentsSearch are documented as not built (doc.go:23) and unimplemented.

E3-S5.note: The opaque epoch-bearing projection-delta cursor client does not exist — no cursor type or method in knowledgeclient.

E3-S6.note: The rebuild step-API (namespace/walk/index-batch/alias-swap) types and client are not implemented anywhere in knowledgeclient.

E3-S7.note: GetEntitlement is real and fail-closed (typed Entitlement, ErrContractShape on undecodable body, real transport error on unreachable host); TestGetEntitlement covers shape-bind + fail-closed cases.

E3-S8.note: Introspect + WhoAmI + ResolveCell are implemented and tested; but the mint and lifecycle-mirror surfaces of FR-L30 are absent, so the introspect/mint/lifecycle-mirror triad is only partially built.

E4-S1.note: Charter + KEDA-friendly WorkerConfig type exist, but RunWorker is a stdlib-only stub returning ErrNotImplemented (Temporal SDK not added, no activity helpers). The D-WF-1 import ban is enforced in satellite repos, not here.

E4-S2.note: The typed error envelope (Result + Outcome success/retryable/terminal + IdempotencyStore interface) is defined, but Replay is a pass-through skeleton (TODO, no key lookup/record), Invoke returns ErrNotImplemented, and constant-200 opt-in is not built.

E5-S1.note: obs.Setup is a stdlib-only no-op stub returning a nil-flush shutdown; no OTLP exporter wiring, no /healthz+/livez handlers, no CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME echo — the otel SDK dependency is not added.

E5-S2.note: HTTP server middleware and client transports for trace stitching do not exist — obs contains only the stub Setup; no middleware/transport code.

E5-S3.note: kafkautil.ReadFromOffset is a stdlib-only stub returning ErrNotImplemented; no franz-go consumer, no epoch:offset cursors, no cell-scoped topic logic.

E6-S1.note: The AGPL-provenance audit is captured as the load-bearing clean-room-provenance charter in dfm/doc.go (legacy @docmost/editor-ext is licence-inheriting; contributors work only from the public contract) and enforced by the gates/agpl-import guard in CI.

E6-S2.note: Four-function clean-room serializer (Serialize/Parse + PmToDfm/DfmToJson) with opaque-node round-trip handles (opaque.go serialize/parse fences) and a type registry; dfm_test.go, equal_test.go, mention_test.go cover it.

E6-S3.note: Golden-corpus parity harness: corpus/ manifest + node/mark/mention/opaque fixtures loaded by corpus_loader.go, with parity_test.go asserting mutation-detects-drift and the D-S11 linear-free cleanroom invariant (runs under go test ./...).

E7-S1.note: Pinned gen/ trees regenerated from gen/contracts/ (pinned SHA in PIN) via scripts/codegen.sh, with gen_test.go asserting committed output matches regeneration (drift/stale gate) and deterministic regen — runs in the CI test job.

evidence: git tags v0.3.0/v0.3.2 referenced in ci.yml:111
E7-S2.note: Single module + semver tags in the v0 window exist (v0.3.x), but the apidiff compile-compat gate is absent — no apidiff target in the Makefile and no apidiff job in ci.yml.

E7-S3.note: Library shape holds: no root cmd/ or Dockerfile (repo builds no images per ci.yml), heavy-SDK packages confined, sealtest/shared_lib_seams_test.go locks the seams, and ci-success is the single aggregate fan-in gate.

E7-S4.note: AGPL-import CI guard implemented as gates/agpl-import/agpl-import-guard.sh, invoked by the ci.yml agpl-guard job and the make agpl-guard target, forbidding any @docmost/* import in-module.

E7-S5.note: Some packages ship offline fakes/doubles (offlineauth StaticJWKS + offlinetest, secrets StaticKeySource, auth/authtest fixtures), but NFR-L5's 'every package ships fakes' is not met — the engine/knowledge/billing/identity clients rely on ad-hoc httptest servers in their own tests rather than shipping reusable fakes.

summary: On merged origin/main @ 8c77c28, pkg/auth is fully built (14 present incl. all 6 verifier/introspection/denylist/scope/conformance stories) and pkg/dfm + the library-engineering CI spine (codegen drift gate, AGPL guard, library shape) are real. The typed clients are thin: engine/knowledge expose only resolve-slug/search, billing/identity introspect are real but ACL typing, projection-delta and rebuild clients are absent, and pkg/obs, pkg/kafkautil and the temporal worker are stdlib-only stubs. Net: 14 present, 11 partial, 6 absent of 31 stories; dev is 22 commits ahead of main so some gaps may already be closed off-main (ENG-2069).
